{{Quote|I guess your purge wasn't efficient enough, Vader!|Echuu Shen-Jon to Darth Vader|<ref name="Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds" />}}
'''Echuu Shen-Jon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] in the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] until its fall, and served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the war, he went into hiding and eventually re-emerged to fight for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
===Early life===
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Echuu Shen-Jon was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Upon [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduating]] from the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]], Shen-Jon was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. Successfully constructing a green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and passing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], Padawan Shen Jon ascended to the rank of Jedi Knight.<ref name="Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns" />

===Clone Wars===
{{Quote|Echuu was accomplishing every task that the Jedi Council asked of him. He was becoming a General that the Confederacy feared. As he grew in power, I knew the dark side would also be growing in its temptation.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|<ref name="Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>}}
[[File:Stam_Death.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Echuu Shen-Jon looking upon the body of his Padawan, Stam Reath]]
Later, as a Jedi Master, Shen-Jon took a Padawan of his own, [[Stam Reath]], during the time that the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] plagued the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. The master and apprentice team joined Master Windu's [[Jedi assault team/Legends|task force]] formed to [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|rescue]] Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] from [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. Landing on the planet with over two hundred Jedi, Master Shen-Jon and Padawan Reath did not enter the [[Petranaki arena]] with the others; instead they were were assigned the task of destroying several [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Core ship/Legends|core ships]]. They succeeded, and were then ordered to pursue Separatist leader [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] as he attempted to reach his escape craft. Along the way they were intercepted by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]], who quickly slew Padawan Reath before Master Shen-Jon's eyes.<ref name="Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns" />

Escaping the battle, Master Shen-Jon slipped into depression. When General Tann reappeared from the shadows, [[Assault on Sarapin|taking]] the planet [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]] in a shocking move with the help of stolen [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimator]] technology, the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] hurriedly assigned Shen-Jon a new Padawan—[[Naat Reath]], Stam Reath's sister.<ref name="Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns" />

Together, Shen-Jon and Reath led a series of successful campaigns against Tann and quickly [[Recapture of Sarapin|took back Sarapin]]. As the weight of war increased, Master Shen-Jon and his new apprentice sank deeper into the lull of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], each wanting revenge for the death of Stam Reath. Shen-Jon tracked Tann across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to the planet [[Krant]], but along the way, Reath was captured by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] general. Master Shen-Jon did not heed the warnings of Master Windu as he slipped into the dark side and went after Tann.<ref name="Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns" />

[[File:Echuu_Dark_side.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Shen-Jon tempted by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]]]

After weeks of pursuit, Master Shen-Jon [[Battle of Krant|confronted]] Tann alone in the heart of a Confederate fortress on Krant. Besting her after calling upon the dark side of the Force, Shen-Jon carried out his revenge for his fallen Padawan and slew Tann. Contacting his current Padawan, Shen-Jon admitted he could not return to the Order until he had meditated on his crimes against the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]]. He told Reath that she would make a fine [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] one day, and bade her return to the Temple for reassignment. This she did, but she never revealed Shen-Jon's location.<ref name="Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns" />

===Exile and re-emergence===
Master Shen-Jon survived in hiding for over two decades through the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] and the disbanding of the Order. His exile spared his life from the Empire's forces. During this time period, he had lost his green lightsaber, but acquired a blue one, which from then on was his weapon of choice.

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]], sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destruction]] of the first [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]], Shen-Jon reemerged from his exile when Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] [[Skirmish in the Krant system|crash-landed]] on the world of Krant. There he aided her in her [[Krantian Civil War|struggle]] against the Empire, [[Battle of Krant (Galactic Civil War)|defending]] the cities of Krant with his lightsaber.<ref name="Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds" />

[[File:Leia_Echuu.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Leia Organa meets Echuu Shen-Jon on Krant.]]
Later, when Organa met with [[Utric Sandov]], Shen-Jon was surprised to hear that the Imperials had found the ancient [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]] [[Vor'Na'Tu]]. He accompanied her to [[Hanoon|Geddes]], and together they [[Battle of Geddes|obtained]] the artifact, but upon returning to their shuttle they found [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] awaiting them.<ref name="Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds" /> Vader demanded that they hand over the relic to him, but Shen-Jon refused to surrender and destroyed it instead. Shen-Jon engaged the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]], but his skills were no match for the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]], and eventually Echuu Shen-Jon was killed. In dueling Vader, he gave Princess Organa enough time to escape.<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

[[File:Echuu_Vader.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Echuu Shen-Jon confronts [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].]]

===Legacy===
After his death, Echuu Shen Jon transcended the physical plane and lived on as a [[Force ghost/Legends|Force spirit]]. Years after his death and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|defeat of the Empire]] at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], Master Echuu Shen-Jon's spirit warned the Princess and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] about the Vor'Na'Tu and urged them to return to Geddes, since [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] and renamed [[Hanoon]], to secure the relic once and for all. Organa and Skywalker [[Battle of Hanoon|liberated]] the world and destroyed the Vor'Na'Tu's shards. Shen-Jon was never known to contact them again.<ref name="Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds" />

==Behind the scenes==
Echuu Shen-Jon was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. He appeared in the game's Rebel campaign, where he was voiced by [[Roger Jackson]]. His backstory was revealed in the expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].

During the Clone Wars, Echuu Shen-Jon had a green lightsaber. However, by the time of Leia Organa's visit, it had changed to blue. This may have been due to the fact that the model used to represent Shen-Jon was recycled from that of the game's Jedi Master class, which carries a blue lightsaber.
